cross_scene_arcs.title: Trust and Love with Berlin
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Helena transitions from a vague witness to building trust with Berlin, sharing personal memories, lying for him, confessing her love, and ultimately finding safety in his embrace.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Emotionally open and protected in Berlin's embrace

cross_scene_arcs.title: Escalating Threat and Rescue
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Helena experiences escalating dangers: a frightening van scare, an intruder violating her home, public humiliation at a party, a direct knife attack by a killer who mocks her blindness, and finally rescue by Berlin.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Safe after Berlin kills the attacker

cross_scene_arcs.title: Dump Investigation and Autopsy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ross initiates the murder investigation at the city dump, escalates with the discovery of a severed hand, and examines autopsy findings that puzzle him.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Lead detective at dump scene initiating investigation
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Identity of victim and meaning of 'frozen'

cross_scene_arcs.title: Conflict and Betrayal with Berlin
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ross warns Berlin against jurisdictional overreach, confronts him about lying, destroys his sentimental lighter, and refuses to support his case, culminating in his notebook being used against Berlin posthumously.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Relationship strained to refusal and posthumous evidence
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Berlin's honesty and the unresolved debt

cross_scene_arcs.title: Reaffirmation and Fatal Shooting
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ross arms himself to join Berlin on a call, is accidentally shot by him on the fire escape, and dies in the hospital, mourned by his wife.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Preparing to confront a suspicious caller with Berlin
